subject: Reasoning & Mental Ability
note: Practice feed me correct answer nahi hota; jaha ID important-questions se match kiya waha answer bhara hai (answer_source dekho).

questions.question_text: Pointing to a photograph of a boy Suresh said, "he is the son of the only son of my mother." How is Suresh related to that boy?
questions.solution: The boy in the photograph is the only son of the son of Suresh's mother i.e., the son of Suresh. Hence, Suresh is the father of boy.

questions.question_text: Amit said, "this girl is the wife of the grandson of my mother". How is Amit related to the girl?
questions.solution: The girl is the wife of the grandson of Amit's mother i.e., the girl is the wife of the son of Amit. Hence, Amit is the father-in-law of the girl.

questions.question_text: Vikas said - This girl is the wife of the grandson of my mother. How is Vikas related to the girl?
questions.solution: The girl is the wife of the grandson of Vikas's mother i.e., the girl is the wife of the son of Vikas. Hence, Vikas is the father-in-law of the girl.

questions.question_text: When Nitin saw Varun, he recalled, he is the son of the father of my daughter. Who is Varun?
questions.solution: Nitin's daughter's mother is Nitin's wife; Nitin's wife's father - Nitin's father-in-law; Father-in-law's son - Nitin's brother-in-law. So, Varun is Nitin's brother-in-law.

questions.question_text: Pointing to Varman, Madhav said, I am the only son of one of the sons of his father. How is Varman related to Madhav?
questions.solution: Madhav is the only son of one of the sons of Varman's father is Either Varman is the father or uncle of Madhav.

questions.question_text: A man said to Vansh, your mother's husband is my brother-in-law. How is the man related to Vansh?
questions.solution: Vansh's mother's husband is the father of Vansh. The Brother-in-law of Vansh's father is Vansh's uncle.

questions.question_text: A, B and C are sisters. D is the brother of E and E is the daughter of B. How is A related to D?
questions.solution: E is the daughter of B and D is the brother of E. So, D is the son of B. Also, A is the sister of B. Thus, A is D's aunt.

questions.question_text: Dipanshu has a brother Aniket. Dipanshu is the son of Prem. Nitesh is Prem's father. In terms of relationship, what is Aniket of Nitesh?
questions.solution: Aniket is the brother of Dipanshu and Dipanshu is the son of Prem. So, Aniket is the son of Prem. Now, Nitesh is the father of Prem. Thus, Aniket is the grandson of Nitesh.

questions.question_text: Reena said, the man going on the road is my mother's husband. How is the man related to Reena?
questions.solution: My (Reena's) mother's husband does mean Reena's father.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a photograph Lata says, "He is the son of the only son of my grandfather." How is the man in the photograph related to Lata?
questions.solution: The man in the photograph is the son of the only son of Lata's grandfather i.e., the man is the son of Lata's father. Hence, the man is the brother of Lata.

questions.question_text: Pointing towards a boy Veena said he is the son of only son of my paternal grandfather. How is that boy related to Veena?
questions.solution:
He is the son of only son of my grandfather - Veena’s Father’s son

Therefore, that boy is a Veena’s brother.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a photograph. Bajpai said, "He is the son of the only daughter of the father of my brother." How Bajpai is related to the man in the photograph?
questions.solution: The man in the photo is the son of the sister of Bajpai. Hence, Bajpai is the maternal uncle of the man in the photograph.

questions.question_text: If P is the brother of the son of Q's son, how is P related to Q?
questions.solution:
Son of Q’s son - Grandson; Brother of Q’s grandson - Q's grandson.

So, P is Q’s grandson.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a woman, Abhijit said, "her granddaughter is the only daughter of my brother." How is the woman related to Abhijit?
questions.solution:
Daughter of Abhijit's brother = niece of Abhijit. Thus the granddaughter of the woman is Abhijit's niece.

Hence, the woman is the mother of Abhijit.

questions.question_text: Pointing towards Ritka, Nirdosh said, I am the only son of her mother's son. How is Ritka related to Nirdosh?
questions.solution:
Ritka’s mother’s son - Ritka’s brother.

So, Nirdosh is the son of Ritka’s brother or Ritka is Nirdosh’s aunt.

questions.question_text: A girl introduces a boy as the son of the brother of her mother. How is the boy related to the girl?
questions.solution: Brother of mother - Uncle; Uncle’s son - Cousin.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a man in a picture, the girl Aisha said, his mother's only daughter is my mother. How is Aisha related to that man?
questions.solution: Aisha’s mother’s mother is man’s mother i.e., Aisha’s mother is man’s sister or Aisha is man’s niece.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a lady, Shohbit said, "her granddaughter is the only daughter of my brother." How is the lady related to Shohbit?
questions.solution: The daughter of Shohbit's brother is the niece of Shohbit. Thus the granddaughter of the woman is Shohbit's niece. Hence, the lady is the mother of Shohbit.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a girl in a photograph Karina said, "she is the only daughter of my mother's husband." Here Karina is talking about:
questions.solution: My (Karina's) mother's husband does mean 'Karina father' and the only daughter of Karina's father is Karina herself. Therefore, in this case, Karina is talking about herself.

questions.question_text: Looking at a picture of a boy, Hemant said, "his mother is the wife of my father's son. Brothers and sisters, I have none." At whose picture was Hemant looking?
questions.solution:
Since Hemant has no brother or sister, so he is his father’s only son.

So, wife of Hemant’s father’s son - Hemant’s wife.

Thus, Hemant’s wife is the boy’s mother or the boy is Hemant’s son.

questions.question_text: When Anup saw Sandeep, he recalled, "he is the son of the father of my daughter's mother." Who is Sandeep to Anup?
questions.solution:
Anup’s daughter’s mother - Anup’s wife; Anup’s wife’s father - Anup’s father-in-law; Father-in-law’s son - Anup’s brother-in-law.

So, Sandeep is Anup’s brother-in-law.

questions.question_text: Pointing to Kalyan, Shreya said, "his mother's brother is the father of my son Manish." How is Kalyan related to Shreya?
questions.solution: Father of Shreya’s son - Shreya’s husband. So, Kalyan is the son of sister of Shreya’s husband. Thus, Kalyan is Shreya’s nephew.

questions.question_text: Introducing a boy, a girl said, "He is the son of the daughter of the father of my uncle." How is the boy related to the girl?
questions.solution: The father of the boy's uncle is the grandfather of the boy and daughter of the grandfather is sister of father.

questions.question_text: Deepak said to Nitin, "That boy playing with the football is the younger of the two brothers of the daughter of my father's wife." How is the boy playing football related to Deepak?
questions.solution: Father's wife = mother. Hence, the daughter of the mother means sister and sister's younger brother means brother. Therefore, the boy is the brother of Deepak.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a lady, Sumit said, "she is the daughter of the only child of my grandmother." How is the lady related to Sumit?
questions.solution:
Only child of Sumit's grandmother - Sumit’s father/mother.

Daughter of Sumit’s father/mother - Sumit’s sister.

questions.question_text: Pointing a photograph X said to his friend Y, "she is the only daughter of the father of my mother." How X is related to the person of photograph?
questions.solution:
The only daughter of the father of X's mother means mother of X.

Hence X is the son of the lady in the photograph.

questions.question_text: Introducing Reeta, Sarika said, "she is the only daughter of my father's only daughter." How is Sarika related to Reeta?
questions.solution:
Sarika is the only daughter of his father - Sarika.

So, Reeta is Sarika’s daughter, i.e. Sarika is Reeta’s mother.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a photograph Anjali said, "he is the son of the only son of my grandfather." How is the man in the photograph related to Anjali?
questions.solution: The man in the photograph is son of Anjali's grandfather's son i.e., the son of Anjali's father. Hence, the boy is the brother of Anjali.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a boy, a woman said, "his mother is the only daughter of my mother." How is the woman related to the boy?
questions.solution:
Only daughter of my mother - Myself.

So, the woman is boy’s mother.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a person, Deepak said, "his only brother is the father of my daughter's father". How is the person related to Deepak?
questions.solution:
Father of Deepak's daughter's father = Deepak's father.

Hence, the person in the brother of Deepak's father.

Therefore, the person is the uncle of Deepak.

questions.question_text: Introducing a man, a woman said, "he is the only son of the mother of my mother." How is the woman related to the man?
questions.solution: The man is the only son of the mother of the woman. Hence, the man is the maternal uncle of the woman. So, the woman is the niece of the man.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a picture, Aamir said, "she is the mother of my Son's wife's daughter". How is Lady related to the Aamir?
questions.solution: Aamir’s son’s wife’s daughter - Aamir’s son’s daughter; Mother of daughter of Aamir’s son - Wife of Aamir’s son. So, Aamir is the father-in-law of the lady.

questions.question_text: If Amitabh says, "Ritik's mother is the only daughter of my mother". How is Amitabh related to Ritik?
questions.solution:
Only daughter of Amitabh’s mother - Amitabh’s sister.

So, Ritik’s mother is Amitabh’s sister or Amitabh is the brother of Ritik’s mother i.e. Ritik’s maternal uncle.

questions.question_text: Pointing to Gopi, Nalni says, "I am the daughter of the only son of his grandfather." How Nalni is related to Gopi?
questions.solution: Nalni is the daughter of the only son of Gopi's grandfather. Hence, it's clear that Nalni is the sister of Gopi.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a girl Sandeep said, "she is the daughter of the only sister of my father." How is Sandeep related to the girl?
questions.solution: The girl is the daughter of the sister of Sandeep's father. Hence, the girl is the cousin or Sandeep is the cousin of the girl.

questions.question_text: Introducing Asha to guests, Bhaskar said, "her father is the only son of my father". How is Asha related to Bhaskar?
questions.solution:
The only son of Bhaskar’s father means Bhaskar himself.

Therefore, Asha is the daughter of Bhaskar.

questions.question_text: Pointing towards a girl, Abhishek says, "this girl is the daughter of only a child of my father." What is the relation of Abhishek's wife to that girl?
questions.solution: Only the child of my father means 'Abhishek' himself. This means the girl is the daughter of Abhishek. Hence, Abhisek's wife is the mother of the girl.

questions.question_text: Sohan said to Mohan, "this girl is the wife of the grandson of my mother". How is Sohan related to this girl?
questions.solution:
The girl is the wife of the grandson of my mother - Sohan’s daughter-in-law

Therefore, Sohan is the Father-in-law of that girl.

questions.question_text: S is the mother of T, T is the husband of J, N is the son of J, Z is father-In-law of J, K is the brother of N. How K is related to Z?
questions.solution:
N is a son of T and J. So, K is a son of T and J.

Z is the father of T

Therefore, Z is the grandfather of K. So, K is the grandson of Z.

questions.question_text: Pointing out a man receiving the prize, Malaika said, "he is the brother of my uncle's daughter". Who is the man to Malaika?
questions.solution:
Brother of uncle’s daughter - Uncle’s son - Cousin.

So, the man is Malaika’s cousin.

questions.question_text: Akshay told Vivek, "yesterday I defeated the only brother of the daughter of grandmother". Whom did Akshay Defeat?
questions.solution: Daughter of grandmother - Aunt; Aunt’s only brother - Father.

questions.question_text: Introducing a man, a woman said, "his mother is the only daughter of my father." How is the man related to the woman?
questions.solution:
His mother is the only daughter of my father - Herself that woman.

Therefore, that man is a woman's son.

questions.question_text: Ashok is the brother of Bani, Bani is the daughter of Chandni and Deepak is the father of Ashok. Then, how is Chandni related to Deepak?
questions.solution:
The relation can be represented as:


So, Chandni is wife of Deepak.

questions.question_text: I am the brother of Hemant and Neha is my sister, Mr. Jayant is my father's father. How is Neha related to Mr. Jayant?
questions.solution:
The relation diagram can be represented as shown below:


So, Neha is the granddaughter of Mr. Jayant

questions.question_text: Introducing a boy, a girl said, "he is the only son of my mother's mother." How is the girl related to that boy?
questions.solution: We can clearly observe from the figure above that girl is the niece of the boy.

questions.question_text: Megha and Risha are sisters. Nishant and Harsh are brothers. Megha is the mother of Nishant. How is Risha related to Harsh?
questions.solution:
The relation diagram can be represented as:


So, Risha is aunt to Harsh.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a woman, Rohan said, "She is the daughter of the only child of my grandmother". How is the woman related to Rohan?
questions.solution: Only child of my grandmother is my father. And my father's daughter is my sister.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a photograph, Sachin tells his friend, "She is the grand-daughter of the elder brother of my father." How is the girl in the photograph related to Sachin?
questions.solution: The girl in the photograph is the daughter of Sachin's cousin. So, the girl is Sachin's niece.

questions.question_text: A man said to Geeta, "Your mother's husband's sister is my aunt." How is Geeta related to the man?
questions.solution: The man's aunt is Geeta's aunt. So, Geeta is man's sister or cousin.

questions.question_text: If Poonam says, "Amit's father Jai is the only son of my father-in-law Sumit", then how is Priya, who is the sister of Amit, related to Poonam?
questions.solution: Poonam is the wife of Jai who is the father of Priya. So, Priya is the daughter of Poonam.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a woman in the picture, Varun said, "Her mother has only one grandchild whose mother is my wife." How is the woman in the picture related to Varun if this woman is the only child of her parents?
questions.solution: The woman in the picture is the only child of her parents, so she is the wife of Varun.

questions.question_text: Pointing out to Pinki, Simmi said, "She is the only daughter-in-law of the grandmother of my father's only son." How is Pinki related to Simmi?
questions.solution: Simmi is the daughter of Pinki's husband. So, Pinki is the mother of Simmi.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a photograph, Veena tells Karan, "I am the only daughter of this lady and her son is your maternal uncle." How is the speaker related to Karan's father?
questions.solution: None of these

questions.question_text: Pointing to a person, Tarun said to Garima, "His mother is the only daughter of your father." How is Garima related to the person?
questions.solution: Only daughter of Garima's father is Garima herself. So, Garima is the mother of the person.

questions.question_text:
All the six members of a family A, B, C, D, E and F are travelling together. B is the son of C but C is not the mother of B. A and C are married couple. E is the brother of C. D is the daughter of A. F is the brother of B.
How many male members are there in the family?
questions.solution: A is the mother and hence female. B is the son and hence male. C is the husband and hence male. D is the daughter and hence female. E is the brother and hence male. F is the brother and hence male. So, there are four males.

questions.question_text:
All the six members of a family A, B, C, D, E and F are travelling together. B is the son of C but C is not the mother of B. A and C are married couple. E is the brother of C. D is the daughter of A. F is the brother of B.
How many children does A have?
questions.solution: Married couple A and C, has son B, son F and daughter D i.e. three children.

questions.question_text:
All the six members of a family A, B, C, D, E and F are travelling together. B is the son of C but C is not the mother of B. A and C are married couple. E is the brother of C. D is the daughter of A. F is the brother of B.
How is E related to D?
questions.solution: E is the brother of C who is the father of D. So, E is the uncle of D.

questions.question_text:
All the six members of a family A, B, C, D, E and F are travelling together. B is the son of C but C is not the mother of B. A and C are married couple. E is the brother of C. D is the daughter of A. F is the brother of B.
Which of the following is a pair of females?
questions.solution: The females are only the mother A and the daughter D.

questions.question_text: A and B are brothers, G and H are sisters. A's son is H's brother. How is B related to G?
questions.solution: B is the brother of G's father. So, B is the uncle of G.

questions.question_text: Pointing towards Harsh, Koyal said, "His mother is the only daughter of my mother." How is Koyal related to Harsh?
questions.solution: Only daughter of Koyal's mother is Koyal herself so, Koyal is the mother of Harsh.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a lady, a man said, "The son of her only brother is the brother of my wife". How is the lady related to the man?
questions.solution: None of these

questions.question_text: Pointing to a lady, Abhinav said, "She is the mother of my father's sister". How is that lady related to Abhinav?
questions.solution: Abhinav's father's sister is his paternal aunt. So, the mother of Abhinav's paternal aunt is his paternal grandmother.

questions.question_text: If M is the brother of K, D is the daughter of K, N is the sister of M and P is the brother of D, then who is the uncle of P?
questions.solution: M

questions.question_text: lf Tarun says, "Deepak's mother is the only daughter-in-law of my father", then how is Tarun related to Deepak?
questions.solution: Father

questions.question_text: Pointing to a man in a photograph, Kunal said, "He is the father of my son's wife's son". How is the man related to Kunal's wife?
questions.solution: Kunal's son's wife's son is his grandson. So, father of Kunal's grandson is Kunal's son. Hence, the man is the son of Kunal's wife.

questions.question_text: In a joint family, there are father, mother, 4 married sons, 2 unmarried sons and three unmarried daughters. Out of the married sons, two have 2 sons each and two have a son and a daughter each. How many male members are there in the family?
Shivam points to a photograph and says, "The woman is my niece's maternal grandmother". How is the woman in the photograph related to Shivam's brother who has no other sibling?
questions.solution: Mother-in-law

questions.question_text: If Karan is the brother of Vijay, Sneha is the daughter of Vijay, Bharti is the sister of Karan and Atul is the brother of Sneha, then how is Karan related to Atul?
questions.solution: Karan is the brother of Vijay. Sneha who is the sister of Atul, is the daughter of Vijay. So, Karan is the uncle of Atul.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a woman in a photograph, Kartik said, "She is the mother of the only daughter of my son". How is Kartik related to the woman in the photograph?
questions.solution: Only daughter of Kartik's son is his grand daughter. So, mother of his grand daughter is Kartik's daughter-in-law. So, Kartik is the father-in-law of the woman.

questions.question_text: Introducing Aman, Kritika says, "His daughter's mother is the only daughter of my father's wife". How is Kritika related to Aman?
questions.solution: Only daughter of Kritika's father's wife is Kritika herself. So, Aman is the husband of Kritika.

questions.question_text: P is brother of Q, R is mother of P, S is father of R. How is S related to Q?
questions.solution: S is the father of Q's mother.

questions.question_text: A is brother of B. C is daughter of A. D is son of B. How are C and D related?
questions.solution: Because A and B are siblings therefore their kids are cousins.

questions.question_text:
If D is the brother of B, then how is B related to C?
To answer this question which of the following statement(s) is/are necessary?
The son of D is the grandson of C.
B is the sister of D.
questions.solution: B is the daughter of C.

questions.question_text: Neeta who is the sister-in-law of Anshu, is the daughter-in-law of Riya. Neeraj is the father of Abhishek who is the only brother of Anshu. How is Neeta related to Abhishek if Neeraj and Riya are a married couple?
questions.solution: Abhishek is the only brother of Anshu and Neeta is sister-in-law of Anshu. So, Neeta is wife of Abhishek.

questions.question_text: Introducing a woman, Sohan said, She is the mother of the only daughter of my son. How that woman is related to Sohan?
questions.solution: The woman is his son's wife that is, daughter-in-law.

questions.question_text: A is son of B. C is wife of A. D is daughter of C. What is D of B?
questions.solution: D is the daughter of B's son.

questions.question_text: Pointing to Gauri a person said, The son of her only brother is the brother of my wife. How is Gauri related to the person?
questions.solution: Gauri's brother is the father-in-law of the person.

questions.question_text:
Read the information given below and answer the question that follow:
A, B, C, D, E and F are six members of a family.
One couple has parents and their children in the family.
A is the son of C and E is the daughter of A.
D is the daughter of F who is the mother of E.
Who are the male members in the family?
questions.solution:
m stands for Male, f stands for Female.

There are two males and 4 females in the family. A and F are parents of children D and E.

questions.question_text:
Read the information given below and answer the question that follow:
A, B, C, D, E and F are six members of a family.
One couple has parents and their children in the family.
A is the son of C and E is the daughter of A.
D is the daughter of F who is the mother of E.
Which of the following pairs is the parents of the children E and D?
questions.solution:
m stands for Male, f stands for Female.

There are two males and 4 females in the family. A and F are parents of children D and E

questions.question_text:
Read the information given below and answer the question that follow:
A, B, C, D, E and F are six members of a family.
One couple has parents and their children in the family.
A is the son of C and E is the daughter of A.
D is the daughter of F who is the mother of E.
Which of the following pairs is the parents of the couple?
questions.solution:
m stands for Male, f stands for Female.

There are two males and 4 females in the family. A and F are parents of children D and E.

questions.question_text: A is the mother of B; B is the sister of D; D is the father of M. How is A related to M?
questions.solution: A is the mother of M's father.

questions.question_text: If P is the brother of Q; Q is the sister of R; and R is the father of S, then how is S related to P?
questions.solution: S is either the nephew or niece of P.

questions.question_text:
A and B are children of D. Who is the father of A?
To answer this question which of the following statements is/are necessary?
C is the brother of A and the son of E.
F is the mother of B.
questions.solution: D is the father of both A and B.

questions.question_text: A's son B is married to C whose sister D is married with E, the brother of B. How is D related to A?
questions.solution: A's sons are B and E. B's wife is C and E's wife is D.

questions.question_text:
A photograph shows Mr. P, Mr. Q, Mrs. R and Mrs. S.
Mrs. R and Mrs. S are sisters. Mr. P is husband of Mrs. R and Mr. Q is husband of Mrs. S. What is Mr. P of Mr. Q?
questions.solution: Mr. P is the husband of Mr. Q's sister-in-law.

questions.question_text:
Study the following information carefully and answer the question.
Five persons Supriya, Nikhil, Avnish, Nipun and Sunita are sitting around a dining table.
Supriya is the mother of Avnish, who is the husband of Sunita.
Nipun is the brother of Supriya.
Nikhil is the husband of Supriya.
How is Nikhil related to Sunita?
questions.solution: Nikhil is husband of Supriya who is mother-in-law of Sunita. So, Nikhil is father-in-law of Sunita.

questions.question_text: Deepanshu is father-in-law of Aanya who is the sister-in-law of Nitin. Savita is mother of Jitu who is the only brother of Nitin. How is Aanya related to Jitu?
questions.solution: Wife

questions.question_text: Pointing towards Abhinav, Karan said to Aarti, His mother is the only daughter of your father. How is Aarti related to Abhinav?
questions.solution: Only daughter of Aarti's father is Aarti herself. So, Aarti is the mother of Abhinav.

questions.question_text: P is father-in-law of Q who is the wife of T. S is mother of T who is the only brother of R. How is R related to P?
questions.solution: P is father of T and T is brother of R. So, P is father of R. Hence, R could be either son or daughter of P.

questions.question_text: Pointing towards a woman, Mitakshi said, Her sister is my daughter's brother's mother. How is the woman related to Mitakshi?
questions.solution: Mitakshi's daughter's brother's mother is Mitakshi herself. So, the woman is the sister of Mitakshi.

questions.question_text: Kirti is the daughter of Smriti. Amit is the son of Smriti's brother Sahil. Smriti is the mother of Nisha. How is Kirti related to Nisha?
questions.solution: Sister

questions.question_text: Priya is the mother of Vishal, who is the husband of Sonika. Nishant is the brother of Priya. Nikhil is the husband of Priya. How is Sonika related to Nikhil?
questions.solution: Vishan is son of Priya and husband of Sonika. So, Sonika is daughter-in-law of Priya and Nikhil is husband of Priya. So, Sonika is daughter-in-law of Nikhil.

questions.question_text: Pointing towards a man, Ankita said, He is the father of the son of my brother's only sister. How is the man related to Ankita?
questions.solution: Ankita's brother's only sister is Ankita herself. So, father of Ankita's son is her husband.

questions.question_text: P is Y's brother. Y is Q's father. Q and X are sisters. How is X related to P?
questions.solution: Y is father of both sisters Q and X and P is brother of Y. So, P is the uncle of Q and X. Hence, X is the niece of P

questions.question_text: A is the brother of B. B is the wife of C. C is the son of P. P is the wife of Q. What is Q of B?
questions.solution: B is the wife of C and C is the son of P. So, B is the daughter-in-law of P. P is the wife of Q, therefore Q is the father-in-law of B.

questions.question_text: P is Q's brother, X is P's mother, Y is X's father, Z is Q's son. How is Z related to P?
questions.solution: Z is the son of Q and P is the brother of Q. So, Z is the nephew of P.

questions.question_text: P and Q are sisters. P is the mother of R. Q's daughter S is married with T. X is the husband of P. How is Q related toT?
questions.solution: S is the daughter of Q and T is the husband of S. So, Q is the mother-in-law of T because of given that P and Q are sisters means Q is female.

questions.question_text: A is the son of C; C and Q are sisters; Z is the mother of Q and P is the son of Z. Which of the following statements is true?

options.label: C
options.text: P is the maternal uncle of A

options.label: D
options.text: Q is the maternal grandfather of A

questions.correct_answer: P is the maternal uncle of A
questions.solution:
Let us draw generation diagram.



(M stands for male and F stands for female) We look P, Q and C are siblings and A is the son of C. So, P is the maternal uncle of A.

questions.question_text: Ravi introduces Raman as the son of the brother of his father's wife. How is Raman related to Ravi?
questions.solution: Father's wife means mother; mother's brother means maternal uncleand maternal uncle's son means cousin. So, Raman is Ravi's cousin.

questions.question_text: M is the father of O and P is the son of Q. N is the brother of M. If O is the sister of P, how is N related to Q?
questions.solution:
Let us draw the generation diagram.



(m stands for male and f stands for female) We see, N and M are brothers and Q is the wife of M. So, N is brother-in-law of Q.

questions.question_text: Sahil said to a lady sitting in a car, The only daughter of the mother of my wife is the sister-in-law of the brother of your sister. How is the husband of the lady related to Sahil?
questions.solution:
The only daughter of the mother of Sahil's wife means Sahil's wife. Sister-in-law of the brother of the lady's sister is lady's sister-in-law.

So, the lady is the sister of Sahil.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a photograph, Rahul said, She is the daughter of my grandfather's only son. How is Rahul related to the girl in the photograph?
questions.solution: My grandfather's only son means my father. So, the girl is the sister of Rahul.

questions.question_text:
Answer the question based on the following information:
A + B means A is the mother of B.
A - B means A is the sister of B.
A * B means A is the father of B.
A {tex}\pi{/tex} B means A is the brother of B.
Which of the following means Q is the grandfather of P?
questions.solution:
Let us consider this option

Q * N * M - P

Q is the father of N and N is the father of M. So Q is the grandfather of M who is the sister of P. Hence, Q is the grandfather of P.

questions.question_text:
Answer the question based on the following information:
A + B means A is the mother of B.
A - B means A is the sister of B.
A * B means A is the father of B.
A {tex}\pi{/tex} B means A is the brother of B.
Which of the following means that N is the maternal uncle of M?
questions.solution:
Let us consider this option



Clearly, M's sister is E and E's mother is L.

M's mother is L. L's sister is P.

M's maternal aunt is P. P's brother is N.

So, N is maternal uncle of M.

questions.question_text: Introducing a man, a woman says, His wife is the only daughter of my father. How is the man related to the woman?
questions.solution: Only daughter of woman's father is woman herself. So, man is the husband of woman.

questions.question_text: If P Q means P is the father of Q, P # Q means P is the mother of Q and P * Q means P is the sister of Q, then N # L $ P * Q shows Q is ________ of N.
questions.solution:
We have,



N is the mother of L and L is father of P. So, P's grandmother is N. Since, P is the sister of Q. So, Q is either grand daughter or grandson of N.

questions.question_text: If A {tex}\times{/tex} B means that A is the sister of B, A {tex}\div{/tex} B means that A is the daughter of B, A - B means that A is the son of B, then how is P related to S in relationship P - Q {tex}\times{/tex} R {tex}\div{/tex} S?
questions.solution:
We have,



R is the daughter of S and Q is sister of R. So, Q is also daughter of S.

Also, P is the son of Q. So, P is grandson of S.

questions.question_text: A family consists of five members B, C, E, F and G. C is the son of G but G is not the mother of C. E and G are married couple. B is the brother of G. F is the daughter of E. Who is the brother-in-law of E?
questions.solution:
Let us draw generation diagram.



(m stands for male and f stands for female) C is son of G but G is not mother of C means G is father of C.

E is wife of G and B is brother of G.

So, B is brother-in-law of E.

questions.question_text: If P + Q means P is the mother of Q, P {tex}\div{/tex} Q means P is the brother of Q, P # Q means P is the father of Q and P * Q means P is the sister of Q, then how is L related to O in K {tex}\div{/tex} L + M # N * O?
questions.solution:
We draw the diagram:



M is father of N and 0 both. L is mother of M. So, L is grandmother of O.

questions.question_text: Pointing to Aanya, Rohit says, She is the only daughter of my father's mother-in-law. How is Aanya related to Rohit?
questions.solution: Rohit's father's mother-in-law is his maternal grandmother. Also, the only daughter of Rohit's maternal grandmother is his mother.

questions.question_text: Saksham is the nephew of Karan. Karan's father is Ajay. Sadhna is Ajay's mother. Sadhna's husband is Atul. Ankita is the mother-in-law of Atul. How is Karan related to Atul?
questions.solution: Grandson

questions.question_text: If A # B means B is father of A, A * B means B is mother of A, A £ B means B is brother of A and A $ B means B is sister of A, then which of the following means O is grandmother of T?
questions.solution:
T £ R means R is brother of T

R # M means M is father of R

M $ P means P is sister of M

P * O means O is mother of P



M is father of both R and T. As, P is the sister of M. So, 0 is the grandmother of T.

questions.question_text: If X - Y means X is the brother of Y, X + Y means X is the mother of Y, X {tex}\div{/tex} Y means X is the daughter of Y, then who is the father of B in A + B - C {tex}\div{/tex} D?
questions.solution: A + B - C {tex}\div{/tex} D, A is the mother of B, who is the brother of C, who is the daughter of D. So, D is the father of B and C.

questions.question_text: Pointing to a man in a photograph, a woman said, The father of his brother is the only son of my grandfather. How is the woman related to the man in the photograph?
questions.solution: Only son of Woman's grandfather is woman's father. Also, the father of man's brother is woman's father. Hence, the woman is the sister of that man.
